proposed_relations.description: QBB local bus total daily ridership metric

evidence_refs.source_quote: Average Weekday Route Daily Q60 (Eastbound) 1,430 Q60 (Westbound)* 1,280 Q60 (Total) 2,710 Q101 (Eastbound) 450 Q101 (Westbound)* 400 Q101 (Total) 850 Q32 (Eastbound) 2,290 Q32 (Westbound) 2,050 Q32 (Total) 4,340 Total 7,900

rationale: Evidence block p007_c0002 appears on page headed 'Queensboro Bridge Bus Priority Study Local Bus Routes' and shows total 7,900 local bus riders on QBB.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Average Weekday Route Daily Q60 (Eastbound) 1,430 Q60 (Westbound)* 1,280 Q60 (Total) 2,710 Q101 (Eastbound) 450 Q101 (Westbound)* 400 Q101 (Total) 850 Q32 (Eastbound) 2,290 Q32 (Westbound) 2,050 Q32 (Total) 4,340 Total 7,900

quarantine.note: Cited block p007_c0002 does not explicitly name Queensboro Bridge or QBB. The block shows only a route-level ridership table ending with 'Total 7,900' — it does not connect that total to the QBB corridor. The page heading ('Queensboro Bridge Bus Priority Study Local Bus Routes') is a separate block (p007_c0001) not cited as evidence. Co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.
